x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Automates switching references between packages and projects.

commands.name: to-projects
commands.description: Switch PackageReference items to local ProjectReference entries.

options.name: --scan-directory
options.description: Directory to scan for local projects.

options.name: --add-projects-to-solution
options.description: Update the solution file to reflect switched references (add or remove projects). [default: False]

commands.name: to-packages
commands.description: Switch local ProjectReference items back to PackageReference entries.

options.name: --scan-directory
options.description: Directory to scan for local projects.

options.name: --add-projects-to-solution
options.description: Update the solution file to reflect switched references (add or remove projects). [default: False]
